generated.title: Cobalt Tempered Structure
generated.alt-text:
Poised, folded, still.
Luminous geometry fills the field with steady radiance, forms visible through spreading halos.
A hushed cobalt tone pervades the composition, evoking aged surface more than emitted light.
Sparse fragments are carefully placed at readable scale, each form individually distinct.
Forms follow a coherent flowing pattern, creating visible directional structure.
Compact geometry with mixed crystal character, smooth panels alongside angular faces, anchored by 122 luminous points.

shadow-lattice.name: Shadow Lattice
shadow-lattice.commentary: Wide web of silvery lines against darkness

generated.title: Tempered Teal Lattice
generated.alt-text:
Balanced, draped, frozen.
Precious concentrated light surfaces from near-blackness, each point a gem against the void.
Pure achromatic structure in silver and white, geometry without chromatic identity.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Orbital bands wrap around the form, arcs of geometry spiraling with architectural discipline.
Compact geometry with mixed crystal character, smooth panels alongside angular faces, anchored by 164 luminous points.

dark-crystal.name: Dark Crystal
dark-crystal.commentary: Vertical crystalline monolith from darkness (same params as Shadow Lattice, different seed)

generated.title: Dim Sapphire Manifold
generated.alt-text:
Flowing, woven, dim.
Half-seen forms breathe through darkness, their light dissolving into atmospheric haze.
Rich cobalt dominates with vivid accents from adjacent hues adding chromatic depth.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Forms follow a coherent flowing pattern, creating visible directional structure.
Mixed surfaces with moderate fragmentation, some panels smooth, others faceted, anchored by 178 luminous points.

generated.title: Field Distilled Plane
generated.alt-text:
Rushing, woven, warm.
Half-seen forms breathe through darkness, their light dissolving into atmospheric haze.
Ruby tones deepen and lighten across the geometry, shifting into neighboring hues.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.
Ordered elements emanate radially, a starburst of crystal planes diverging from the center.
Mixed surfaces with moderate fragmentation, some panels smooth, others faceted, anchored by 192 luminous points.

chartreuse-current.name: Chartreuse Current
chartreuse-current.commentary: Breakthrough vivid lime green (the one vivid, bright piece)

generated.alt-text:

Rich emerald dominates with vivid accents from adjacent hues adding chromatic depth.
A measured arrangement of translucent planes fills the space, balancing density with legibility.

generated.title: Scattered Cerulean Lattice
generated.alt-text:
Anchored, shattered, mild.
Luminous geometry fills the field with steady radiance, forms visible through spreading halos.
Cerulean tones deepen and lighten across the geometry, shifting into neighboring hues.
Hundreds of fine particles swarm, individual elements dissolving into dense atmospheric haze.
A turbulent storm of scattered geometry, orbital currents overwhelmed by disorder.
Shattered geometry disperses in every direction, smooth and angular fragments intermixed, anchored by 430 luminous points.
